fine_art_intro_1: Zojambula zapamwamba zakhala chikayikidwe cha anthu olemera kwa zaka mazana ndipo nthawi zambiri zimaonedwa ngati malo osungira chuma.
fine_art_intro_2: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe anthu ambiriso amaona ngati malo osungira chuma ndi chikayikidwe.
fine_art_intro_3: Koma kodi zojambula zamaonekedwe zimasiyana bwanji ndi ndalama zadigitala ngati Bitcoin? Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa Bitcoin ndi Zojambula Zapamwamba.
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito mofanana - bitcoin imodzi ndi yofanana ndi bitcoin ina iliyonse padziko lonse. Zojambula zapamwamba ndi zapadera pamapangidwe, mbiri, kuyendera, ndi chiyambi, zomwe zimapangitsa kuyerekezera ndi kuwerengera kukhala kovuta kwambiri.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin imagulitsidwa pa msika wa 24/7 padziko lonse pomwe aliyense wokhala ndi intaneti amatha kugula kapena kugulitsa nthawi yomweyo. Zojambula zapamwamba zimafuna nyumba za malonda zapadera, ndipo malonda amatha kutenga miyezi.
point_3_summary_1: Kugula kapena kugulitsa bitcoin nthawi zambiri kumalandira malipiro ochepa kwambiri. Zojambula zapamwamba zimabweretsa ndalama zambirimbiri kuphatikiza malipiro oogula, malipiro a ogulitsa, inshulansi, kuyendetsa, ndi ena.
point_4_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kugawidwa kukhala zigawo 100 miliyoni zomwe zimatchedwa satoshis, zomwe zimapangitsa kukhala yabwino pa malonda a kukula kulikonse. Zojambula zapamwamba singagawidwe.
point_5_summary_1: Umwini ndi kunena kwa Bitcoin kumatha kutsimikizidwa pa blockchain ndi aliyense. Zojambula zapamwamba zimafuna otsimikizira akatswiri odula ndipo zachinyengo nthawi zambiri zimanyenga dziko la zojambula.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin, ikasungidwa bwino, singawonongeke ndi madzi, moto, zivomezi, mphepo, kuba, kapena masoka ena. Zojambula zapamwamba zili pa chiwopsezo cha kuwonongeka kwa mtundu uliwonse.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin imatha kugulidwa ndi kugulitsidwa ndi aliyense wokhala ndi intaneti ndi ndalama zing'onozing'ono. Chikayikidwe cha zojambula zapamwamba ndi cha anthu olemera chifukwa cha mitengo yokwera.
